name: claude-structure
description: Stack-agnostic spec-driven workflow plugin for Claude Code: 3 subagents, 13 curated skills, 4 deterministic quality-gate hooks, AUTO_MODE for autonomous multi-phase implementation. Skill set is data-driven (81-session usage analysis).

plugins.name: claude-structure
